sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Trump Assasination Suspect Wants Judge Aileen Cannon To Recuse Herself: The Ex-President Has 'Bolstered The Perception That The Court Is Partial In His Favor'
feed.summary: Ryan Routh, charged with the attempted assassination of former President Donald Trump, has requested the recusal of U.S. District Judge Aileen Cannon from his case, citing potential bias. What Happened: Routh's legal team submitted a request on Thursday for Judge Cannon to step down from the case.
